brand.name: Cherry Coco
brand.mission: To create a space for reflective, emotionally rich storytelling that helps people understand themselves and feel less alone.

hero.headline: A quiet, beautiful space to understand yourself.
dailyLines: Some days healing looks like naming what hurt in the first place.
You are allowed to outgrow stories that once kept you safe.
Reflection is not delay. It is how meaning is made.
The life you want might begin with one honest sentence.

featuredStory.title: The Language I Found After Burnout
featuredStory.summary: A personal account of rebuilding identity after high achievement became emotional silence.

pathways.description: Stories on emotional fog, values, and grounded decisions.

pathways.description: Stories on transition fatigue, grief loops, and small movement.

pathways.label: I want to feel seen
pathways.description: Voices about belonging, shame, tenderness, and language.

pathways.label: I want to create
pathways.description: Pieces on making art while healing and building honest rituals.

globalVoices.title: What Masculinity Cost My Brother, and Me
Painting Through Panic in a Loud City

closingRitual.question: What have you been pretending not to feel?
closingRitual.prompt: Write six lines starting with: Today I can be honest about...
